who: medical receptionists in small clinics scheduling 50-100 appointments/week
offer: For medical receptionists in small clinics processing 50-100 appointments/week, scheduling conflicts cause patient dissatisfaction. We provide a conflict-flagging tool instead of manual scheduling via paper or basic digital calendars.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical receptionists
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling tools
DM outreach to medical receptionists with demo video
Community forums for medical receptionists sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual appointment entry and conflict alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing appointment data
